Food service is not easy
Anyone gonna call that number?
Fuck now I want a steak bake
I love when they need no translation.
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
Oh my
This is your daily reminder that being person of the year doesn't make you a good person, it is given to people who had the most impact on the year.
For the TERF is it not enough to be Cisgender, you must also conform to their very exacting standards.
The Individual is a fucking cool ass name.
:)
O-O
Imagine fucking up this badly
O-O
OwO
I was born with one (1) kidney and a fucked up brain
Imagine your last words being "Rhut row"
love how every single one of these memes feature them being shown grass.

item.dc:creator: OneInThePinkTwoInTheStink

item.title: $150 down the drain
item.description: Ironically, other than the price point, this was the reason I was skeptical of them for so long, getting lost easily or misplaced. $15 corded headphones go through the wash somehow, ehhh whatever, and I always know where that tangled mass of cord is. I got used to how lovely it was to effortlessly listen to music all day at work, and the sound quality and noise cancelling was amazing. I'll be buying another pair once I scrape together another $150 but GOD FUCKING DAMNIT!!!!!!!
item.dc:creator: TypicalMyra

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Saturday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur

greetings online friends
wow what a cool bat
at least 1
dang
her hat is pretty small for a dimmadome
big non fan of energy drinks
have you ever met someone who vehemently dislikes memes?
gotta crack em all
as is tradition
yes
not like right now, but over time there's been lots of em
the band is called System of a Down and he is Serj Tankian
big night
mmm hmm
that's a lot of space weed
shit yeah
holler at your boy
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: Just a few memes to brighten and/or ruin your weekend
item.description:
Cats are either great or terrible accomplices, depending on how willing they are to go along with you.
Works for me.
Man, I haven't had Cane's in forever...
ADHD: Ass Don't Have Dopamine
Let's be real though, no industry ever lives up to its safety standards.
Okay, but what are the goblins' pronouns?
I believe in Double Trouble supremacy.
Looks like the toxic gas inhalation warnings I see at work, just splatterier.
Me, every day.
I have in fact played with bards who wouldn't help dispose of the bodies. Not many, but I have.
Mimicu is one of my wife's favorite Pokemon.
I do love me some good American Gothic/folk horror. Shout out to @chicar for putting together some excellent folk horror dumps, among other things
Tortellini tax. Thank you for stopping by. I hope you all enjoyed or suffered appropriately.

item.title: Fresh(ish) Memes #206
item.dc:creator: ShaggyRoots

item.title: I blocked my emotionally abusive mother’s phone number. She messaged me through WhatsApp
item.description:
Yes, these are all photos of me. My literally sent me photos of me from her phone before she deletes them all. Last year, my mother disowned me when I tried to set boundaries. In my educated opinion, I believe my mother has borderline personality disorder. We have had a very rocky relationship throughout my life, with some periods being very good, but not recently. After she said I should only contact her if I want to apologize and admit everything bad I’ve done, she has continued to send me passive aggressive messages and try to goad me into interacting with her again. Back in May, she called me out of the blue and tried to corner me into another conversation. I ended up texting her a message afterwards, turning my phone off for a few hours, read her response, and then decided to finally completely block her number. Imagine my surprise when I get a notification from WhatsApp to 21 messages. The family used to have a group chat on there, so I guess she finally figured out that I had blocked her number. One of her last text messages (from last year) said that if I wanted a family, I should go find my biological family (I was adopted). She just keeps trying to hurt me. And unfortunately, it’s working.
Dog tag of my Pippin. Not sure what was going through my mind when I took this. I was feeling a little silly, I guess.
item.dc:creator: thetinytraveler

item.title: Float like dat
item.description: It's Saturday I hope you smile or crack a mental smirk at some point today, from this or an unrelated thing - even if only a brief moment. Cheers!!

item.title: Jimmy Carter lost his election and fucked off and built homes for other people well into his late 80?s, and established a foundation that helped lower the global incidence of Guinea worm disease from about 3,500,000 people to, uhm, 10. What a loser!
